sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِصِحَّةِ الْإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje vode je veoma važno za ljudsko zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking water is very important for human health.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِشُرْبِ ثَمَانِيَةِ أَكْوَابٍ عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju pijenje najmanje osam čaša dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise drinking at least eight glasses a day.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْمَاءُ الْجِسْمَ عَلَى الْعَمَلِ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ وَالْبَقَاءِ نَشِيطًا.
sentences.translation: Voda pomaže tijelu da bolje radi i ostane aktivno.
sentences.translationEn: Water helps the body work better and stay active.
